model.chat.reason: adapter exposes agent turns rather than direct model calls

model.streaming.reason: model deltas may be reconstructed from coarse progress events

model.reasoning.output.reason: adapter does not expose raw reasoning events

model.tool_calling.reason: tool calls may be visible only as agent progress

action.tools.list.reason: adapter does not expose a normalized tool catalog

action.tools.execute.reason: tool execution is mediated by the remote agent service

action.tools.progress.reason: progress is mapped from coarse agent notifications when available

action.tool_sources.attach.reason: tool-source attachment must happen inside the adapted system

action.permissions.reason: permission prompts are mapped to the adapted system's request/response flow

session.list.reason: adapter can list sessions only when the adapted system exposes them

transcript.load.reason: adapter may reconstruct transcript history from persisted session state

session.message.delivery.queue.reason: adapter queues messages in its own session wrapper

session.message.delivery.steer.reason: adapted system does not expose active-run steering

session.message.delivery.btw.reason: adapted system cannot run side questions without blocking the main run

run.streaming.reason: stream shape follows the adapted system's progress model

run.instructions.reason: adapter may only prepend instructions to user input rather than replacing native instructions

run.tool_selection.reason: adapted system does not expose per-run tool selection

run.cancel.reason: cancel maps to cooperative cancellation when supported

run.interrupt.reason: interrupt maps to cooperative cancellation or a stop request when supported

run.resume.reason: adapter cannot guarantee resumable run state

checkpoint.reason: adapter does not expose checkpoint identity

models.list.reason: model catalog may be inferred from the adapted system

auth.providers.reason: auth is owned by the adapted system

degradation.reason: adapter does not expose raw or summarized reasoning
adapter cannot always distinguish tool progress from general agent progress
resume state is not available across the adapter boundary
adapted system does not expose active-run steering
